title: Crunchy Resinous Polish Rigatoni Pasta
description: A hearty Polish-inspired dish featuring crunchy rigatoni pasta, a flavorful resinous sauce, and a sprinkle of crispy onions, all within a cozy bamboo tray.
instructions: Bake the sesame seeds in a small bowl for 5 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Cook the rigatoni pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the sunflower seed oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook for 10 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Add the minced garlic, caraway seeds, apple cider vinegar, and honey to the skillet.
Stir in the toasted sesame seeds, lemon zest, and chopped parsley.
Combine the cooked rigatoni pasta and resinous sauce in a large serving bowl.
Top with crispy onions and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional parsley and sesame seeds, if desired.
Serve in a cozy bamboo tray and enjoy!
